nasb.text: For a while he was unwilling; but afterward he said to himself, ‘Even though I do not fear God nor respect man,

esv.text: For a while he refused, but afterward he said to himself, ‘Though I neither fear God nor respect man,

cnv.text: 他多次不肯，後來心裡說：‘我雖然不懼怕　神，也不尊敬人，

ccb.text: 审判官总是充耳不闻，但后来心里想，‘虽然我不怕上帝，也不在乎人，

csbs.text: “法官一直不肯，但是后来心里说：‘即使我不敬畏神，也不尊重人，
